description.value:
Prerequisite: Cha 15, character level 8th, Leadership.

Benefit: By spending an action point and taking a move action, you can give a number of allies equal to your Charisma bonus one of the following benefits: A +2 bonus on attack rolls and saving throws for the next round; Immediately shake off a stunned or dazed condition; Gain an immediate new Will saving throw against a mental power affecting them, with a +2 bonus; or Reduce current vitality point damage by 3. The same benefit must be given to all affected allies, and they must all be able to hear and understand you.
description.summary: By spending an action point and taking a move action, you can give a number of allies equal to your Charisma bonus…
